patch.description:
Modify an existing AI annotation (immutable pattern).

Creates a new annotation with the updated data and deactivates
the old one. Supports SAM and other refinement models.

username.description: Required. 150 characters or fewer. Letters, digits and @/./+/-/_ only.
username.title: Username

username.description: Required. 150 characters or fewer. Letters, digits and @/./+/-/_ only.
username.title: Username

APIKeyCreatedOutput.description:
Returned only at creation time — the one response that carries the
plaintext token. Shown to the caller exactly once.
APIKeyCreatedOutput.title: APIKeyCreatedOutput

ProjectImageAnnotationInput.description: Single annotation for a specific image (image_id comes from the URL).
ProjectImageAnnotationInput.title: ProjectImageAnnotationInput

ProjectAnnotationModifyOutput.description: Returned after modifying an annotation via the infer API.
ProjectAnnotationModifyOutput.title: ProjectAnnotationModifyOutput

ProviderOutput.description:
Provider representation for API responses.

Deliberately omits ``auth_secret``. ``has_auth_secret`` lets clients show
whether a credential is configured without exposing it. ``is_global`` is
true for admin-managed providers shared across projects.
ProviderOutput.title: ProviderOutput

ProviderUpdateInput.description: Partial update; all fields optional. ``auth_secret`` is write-only.
ProviderUpdateInput.title: ProviderUpdateInput

AutoAnnotateInput.description:
Kick off an auto-annotation job.

Provide ``image_ids`` to target specific images, or omit it to target the
whole project (optionally narrowed to images without active annotations via
``only_unannotated``). ``max_images`` is a safety cap.
AutoAnnotateInput.title: AutoAnnotateInput
